zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Poynings於大約1350年出生在英國英格蘭素可斯勞加姆時，她的父親Michael de Poynings33歲，母親Joane de Rokesley30歲。她於1366年2月10日之後與William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1403年6月12日享年54歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福也斯 阿爾蓋特 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Poynings于大约1350年出生在英国英格兰素可斯勞加姆时，她的父亲Michael de Poynings33岁，母亲Joane de Rokesley30岁。她于1366年2月10日之后与William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1403年6月12日享年54岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福也斯 阿爾蓋特 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Poynings was born about 1350, in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Michael de Poynings, was 33 and her mother, Joane de Rokesley, was 30. She married William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf after 10 February 1366, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 June 1403, at the age of 54, and was buried in London Saint Botolph's Aldgate Churchyard, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Poynings est née environ 1350, à Slaugham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Michael de Poynings, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joane de Rokesley, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf après 10 février 1366, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 juin 1403, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à London Saint Botolph's Aldgate Churchyard, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Poynings um 1350 in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Michael de Poynings 33 und ihre Mutter Joane de Rokesley 30. Sie hat nach 10. Februar 1366 in England William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Juni 1403 im Alter von 54 Jahren und wurde in London Saint Botolph's Aldgate Churchyard, Middlesex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Poyningsが約1350年にイギリスイギリススセックススラウアムで生まれた時，父Michael de Poyningsは33歳，母Joane de Rokesleyは30歳であった。1366年2月10日以後にイギリスでWilliam Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1403年6月12日に54歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン サイント ボトルフ'ス アルドガト チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Poynings(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 슬로그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Michael de Poynings(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane de Rokesley(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1366년 2월 10일 이후 영국에서 William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 6월 12일 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 세인트 벗프'스 알드가트 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Poynings nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Slaugham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Michael de Poynings, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Rokesley, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf após 10 de fevereiro de 1366, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de junho de 1403, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em London Saint Botolph's Aldgate Churchyard, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London Saint Botolph's Aldgate Churchyar: лондон сеинт ботолф'с алджэит чурчярд, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Poynings родилась около 1350 г. в местности слоам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Michael de Poynings было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joane de Rokesley, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf после 10 февраль 1366 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 июня 1403 г. в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон сеинт ботолф'с алджэит чурчярд, миддлесекс, Англия.

Se casó con William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf después de 10 de febrero de 1366, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de junio de 1403, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en London Saint Botolph's Aldgate Churchyard, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
